<!-- Page Type: Socialvideo -->
<!-- Generated by SEOwlsClaw v0.1 | SEO with Owls Claw (See Owls Claw) -->

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>{TITLE} — {DESCRIPTION}</title>
    <meta name="description" content="{DESCRIPTION_LENGTH_160_chars_max}">
    
    <!-- Schema: VideoObject or Article -->
    <script type="application/ld+json">
    {
      "@context": "https://schema.org",
      "@type": "VideoObject",
      "name": "{TITLE}",
      "description": "{DESCRIPTION}",
      "thumbnailUrl": "{THUMBNAIL_URL}",
      "uploadDate": "{UPLOAD_DATE_FORMATTED}",
      "creator": {
        "@type": "Organization",
        "name": "{BRAND_OR_CHANNEL_NAME}"
      },
      "contentUrl": "{VIDEO_URL_YOUTUBE_TIKTOK}"
    }
    </script>
</head>
<body>

    <!-- SOCIAL HEADER -->
    <header class="social-header-video">
        <h1>{H1_SHORT_TITLE_KEYWORD} — {SHORT_DESCRIPTION}</h1>
        <p class="platform-tag">{PLATFORM_NAME_YOUTUBE_TIKTOK}</p>
        <div class="duration-indicator">{DURATION_FORMATTED_MINUTES_SECONDS}</div>
    </header>

    <!-- TITLE + DESCRIPTION SECTION -->
    <section class="video-meta">
        <h3><strong>YouTube/TikTok SEO Title</strong></h3>
        <p>{TITLE_YT_TITLE_KEYWORDS_120_CHARS_MAX}</p>
        
        <h4><strong>Detailed Description (First 200 chars crucial)</strong></h4>
        <p>{DESCRIPTION_FIRST_200_CHARS_MAX} — Includes primary keyword for search snippet</p>
    </section>

    <!-- TRANSCRIPT NOTES H5 Section -->
    <section class="transcript-section">
        <h5><strong>Key Moments / Timestamps (For SEO + Accessibility)</strong></h5>
        <ul class="timestamps">
            <li>{TIMESTAMP_0_MINUTES_SECONDS} — Intro & Hook</li>
            <li>{TIMESTAMP_1_MINUTES_SECONDS} — Main Content Highlight</li>
            <li>{TIMESTAMP_2_MINUTES_SECONDS} — Call to Action CTA</li>
        </ul>
    </section>

    <!-- ALT TEXT H6 Section -->
    <footer class="alt-text-video">
        <h6><strong>Voiceover/Alt Text for SEO</strong></h6>
        <p>{ALT_TEXT_TRANSCRIPT_100_CHARS_MAX}</p>
        <ul class="transcript-bullets">
            <li>{KEYWORD_MENTION_IN_VIDEO}</li>
            <li>{SECONDARY_KEYWORD_MENTIONED}</li>
        </ul>
    </footer>

    <!-- LINK INTEGRATION -->
    <div class="link-integration-video">
        <a href="{VIDEO_PAGE_LINK_YOUTUBE}">{BRAND_NAME_PRODUCT_LINK_TEXT}</a>
    </div>

</body>
</html>

<!-- Editing Guide: Change any {PLACEHOLDER} text directly in this file before generation -->
<!-- Video posts need YouTube/TikTok SEO optimization with transcripts, timestamps, and descriptive alt text! -->
